visuals.alt: Fraction bar showing 3 out of 4 parts shaded, representing 3/4

steps.subgoalLabel: Draw and divide the number line
steps.instruction: Look at a number line from 0 to 1. The denominator is 4, so it is divided into 4 equal parts.
steps.explanation: The denominator tells us how many equal parts to make.

steps.instruction: Label each mark as a fraction.
The numerator is 3, so count 3 marks from 0.
steps.explanation: 3/4 is three fourths of the way from 0 to 1.

title: Locating Fractions Between 0 and 1 with Thirds

steps.instruction: Look at a number line from 0 to 1, divided into 3 equal parts.
Name the fraction at each mark.
steps.explanation: Each mark is one more third.

steps.instruction: Notice that 2/3 is twice as far from 0 as 1/3.
steps.work: 0 to 1/3 is one jump. 0 to 2/3 is two jumps.
steps.explanation: Fractions on a number line show equal spacing. The jumps are all the same size.
